page_title: Super visa for parents and grandparents: Who can apply - Canada.ca

sections.heading: On this page
bullets: Host requirements
Applicant requirements
General requirements for visiting Canada
Visa-exempt applicants

sections.heading: Applicant requirements
items: To be eligible, you ( the applicant ) must
bullets: be outside Canada when you submit your application
have your visa printed by a visa office outside Canada (wait for visa office instructions)
be allowed to enter Canada

show proof that you have private health insurance valid for a minimum of 1 year from the date of entry from a Canadian insurance company or from a company outside Canada that has been approved by the minister
from a Canadian insurance company or
from a company outside Canada that has been approved by the minister
take an immigration medical exam (opens in a new tab)
meet certain other conditions

sections.heading: General requirements for visiting Canada
items: There are some general conditions you must meet to come to Canada as a visitor. Before we make a decision on your application, we’ll also consider
bullets: whether you’re a genuine visitor to Canada who will leave by choice at the end of your visit
your ties to your home country
the purpose of your visit
your family and finances

eligibility_signals: proof of ties to home country
